info.description: Backend API service for Splittr bill splitting.
info.title: Splittr API

get.description: Get audit logs of all actions performed by the current user or in their groups.
Calculate net balances and recommended settlement transactions.

parameters.description: Filter by Group ID. If omitted, returns global balances.
parameters.name: groupId

get.description: Retrieve a list of expenses filtered by group, personal=true, or friendId.

post.description: Create a new expense with equal/exact/percentage splits.
Create a settlement payment between two users.

get.description: Get a specific expense's details including all splits.
Get a list of all friends of the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Create a friendship link with another user by their email or phone.

delete.description: Delete a friendship link by friend ID.

get.description: Retrieve all bill-splitting groups the current user belongs to.

post.description: Join an existing group using its unique invite code.

delete.description: Soft-delete a bill splitting group. Only group creators can archive.

get.description: Get a group's metadata and a list of all its members.

post.description: Add a user to a group by their User ID. Only admins can add members.

oneOf.description: User ID of the member to add

requestBody.description: User ID of the member to add

delete.description: Remove a user from a group, or leave the group if removing yourself.

parameters.description: User ID of the member to remove
parameters.name: userId

put.description: Update the role (e.g. ADMIN, MEMBER) of a user inside the group.

parameters.description: User ID of the member to update
parameters.name: userId

get.description: Get all notifications in the tray for the current user.

post.description: Mark all unread notifications as read for the current user.
Mark a specific notification as read by ID.
Create a new user profile using Firebase identities.

get.description: Retrieve the profile details of the logged-in user.

put.description: Update name or default currency for the current user.
